title: First Sight of Yggdrasil
summary: Ada directly witnesses the branch nexus and confirms world-tree traditions as compressed witness language for real structure.

narrative.newInfo: Fermi paradox inversion is affirmed at experiential scale: contact source is parallel human lineage.
narrative.dripHook: How does a society absorb this truth without fracturing?
narrative.payoffDelivered: Book 1 promise delivered: direct encounter and paradigm reframe.
narrative.beautyHooks: Myth, mathematics, memory, and measurement collapse into one image.
narrative.notes: Cadence: climax + charged aftermath. Function: convergent payoff across anomaly, myth, Potter, and protocol lanes. Exit: societal stakes open for Book 2.

rewardTokens.description: World-tree structure is directly perceived and recontextualizes prior clues.
Contact source reframes from alien-other to adjacent human lineages.
Awe and destabilization set up the societal question for Book 2.
